title: jasminum kedahense
intro: Jasminum kedahense is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the Kedah jasmine or Malay jasmine. The plant is native to Malaysia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Jasminum kedahense include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
